name: bahay-ni-kuya
description: Boarding House Management System for Bahay ni Kuya (Vite + React + Express + Prisma + PostgreSQL)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.db:setup: npm --prefix server run prisma:migrate && npm --prefix server run seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:up && npm --prefix server run prisma:generate && npm run db:setup
